title: These 3 Obesity Drug Stocks Are Set to Soar This Fall and Beyond
text: Obesity drug stocks including VKTX are positioned for significant growth as the market for weight-loss therapies expands rapidly. The global anti-obesity drugs market, valued at $36.91 billion in 2025, is projected to skyrocket to $226.14 billion by 2035, growing at an impressive compound annual growth rate of 20%. Viking Therapeutics' VK2735 has demonstrated compelling clinical data with the injectable formulation achieving up to 14.7% weight loss in Phase 2 testing and the oral formulation showing up to 12.2% weight loss, potentially outperforming some existing options. Wall Street analysts maintain a Strong Buy consensus on VKTX with average price targets around $88-92, forecasting over 170% upside from current levels. The company's robust $900+ million cash position provides ample runway for advancing Phase 3 development of VK2735 and pipeline expansion. Competitors like Eli Lilly and Novo Nordisk have entrenched franchises, but multiple treatments will be needed to address the massive obesity market opportunity. Viking's dual GLP-1/GIP approach and potentially superior tolerability profile could differentiate it in a competitive landscape. Phase 3 VANQUISH trials are enrolling rapidly and expected to drive significant value creation as results emerge.
